meaning: adj.(葡萄牙航海家)麦哲伦的,以麦哲伦命名的,麦哲伦海峡的
examples: In Vicuna, distant star systems such as Magellanic Clouds can be seen without the help of an instrument.
The two Magellanic are each about ten times larger.
The Large Magellanic Cloud is about 15, 000 light-years across.
Visitors will spend up to an hour observing the very vocal Magellanic penguins, which bellow and strut along the beach by the hundreds.
In forests of native cypress and Magellanic and Antarctic beech, unseen as the ship slipped by, the diminutive and endangered huemul deer roamed, as well as rarely seen pumas.
